title: General Purpose Constants
description:
General Purpose Constants

General Purpose Constants

Constant Name	Value	Usage

TRUE	1	Boolean expression

FALSE	0	Boolean expression

CR	CHR$(13)	String expression

LF	CHR$(10)	String expression

CRLF	CHR$(13) + CHR$(10)	String expression

TAB	Tab character	String expression

PI	3.1415926535898	Numeric expression
